title: Ribbits
body:
![Ribbits](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/458fd0365d1cf47b37ce003e7f2c9daea2cdb79d.png)  ![Ribbits_2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/73a878cb94d406ab3e3f136a295b794beb3a106a.png)



Ribbits will add swamp villages full of tiny frog villagers called ribbits!
These little guys will sometimes sit down in groups to play music, which you can join in with!
Merchant and fisherman ribbits can be traded with for various items including the new ribbits plant blocks & maracas!
Sorcerer ribbits will occasionally cast spells to buff the player, and all gardener ribbits will water crops! 
Ribbits will naturally return to their homes at night, but if you'd like to relocate them, you can reset their home point to their current position by right clicking them with amethyst. 


Josh/Joosh - Art
yungnickyoung - Coding
HellionGames - Coding
wesleybenjamin - Music
Scratchy - Sound effects
joakota - Builds
joshesque - Logo

**** [**Golem Overhaul**](https://www.modrinth.com/mod/golem-overhaul) A mod which adds 9 new golem types!
[**Enderman Overhaul**](https://www.modrinth.com/mod/enderman-overhaul) A mod which overhauls the vanilla endermen!
[**Creatures and Beasts**](https://www.modrinth.com/mod/creatures-and-beasts) A mod that adds amazing creatures into Minecraft!
[**Critters and Companions**](https://www.modrinth.com/mod/critters-and-companions) A mod which adds a variety of friendly animals!
[**Creeper Overhaul**](https://www.modrinth.com/mod/creeper-overhaul) A mod which overhauls the vanilla creepers!
[**Ghost**](https://www.modrinth.com/mod/ghost) A mod which adds two friendly ghost mobs to your world!
[**Nightlights**](https://www.modrinth.com/mod/nightlights) A mod that adds a variety of new light sources to Minecraft!
[**Lookin' sharp**](https://www.modrinth.com/mod/lookin-sharp) Adding 60 new melee weapons to the game!
